checkEmail.signupBody: We sent an email to <email></email>. Click the link to confirm your account.
checkEmail.resetBody: If an account exists for <email></email>, we've sent a link to reset your password.

signupDemographics.title: Tell us a bit more
signupDemographics.subtitle: Optional, but it helps us show you how you compare to people in your country, industry, and salary range.

reset.title: Set your new password

errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.emailNotConfirmed: Please confirm your email before signing in.
errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Try again in a few minutes.
errors.sameOrigin: New password must differ from the current one.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.sessionExpired: The link has expired. Request a new one.

errors.invalidRole: That role doesn't exist. Please choose from the options below.
